name: codedb (default MCP)
constraint_prompt:
Use ONLY via Bash:
- <codedb-repo>/zig-out/bin/codedb <corpus>/react search <query>
- <codedb-repo>/zig-out/bin/codedb <corpus>/react find <name>
- <codedb-repo>/zig-out/bin/codedb <corpus>/react word <ident>
- <codedb-repo>/zig-out/bin/codedb <corpus>/react outline <relpath>
Forbidden: Read, grep, rg, find, cat, ls, head, tail, sed, lean-ctx, sqlite3, any mcp__*.

name: codedb (LEAN env + paths-only flag)
constraint_prompt:
Use ONLY via Bash. All codedb invocations should set CODEDB_QUIET=1; use --paths-only on search when only locations matter:
- CODEDB_QUIET=1 <codedb-repo>/zig-out/bin/codedb <corpus>/react search [--paths-only] <query>
- CODEDB_QUIET=1 <codedb-repo>/zig-out/bin/codedb <corpus>/react find <name>
- CODEDB_QUIET=1 <codedb-repo>/zig-out/bin/codedb <corpus>/react word <ident>
- CODEDB_QUIET=1 <codedb-repo>/zig-out/bin/codedb <corpus>/react outline <relpath>
Forbidden: Read, grep, rg, find, cat, ls, head, tail, sed, lean-ctx, sqlite3, any mcp__*.

name: SQLite FTS5 (trigram tokenizer)
constraint_prompt:
Use ONLY:
- sqlite3 <corpus>/fts5_trigram.db "SELECT ..." via Bash
- Read (built-in tool, for reading any matched file)
Forbidden: grep, rg, find, cat, ls, head, tail, sed, codedb, lean-ctx, any mcp__*.
Query syntax: substring match wrapped in double-quoted MATCH expression. Example:
  sqlite3 <corpus>/fts5_trigram.db "SELECT path FROM files WHERE files MATCH '\"useState\"' LIMIT 10"
Use bm25(files) for ranking, snippet(files, 1, '>>', '<<', '...', 8) for previews.

name: lean-ctx (CLI)
constraint_prompt:
Use ONLY via Bash (cd into corpus first):
- cd <corpus>/react && lean-ctx grep <pattern>
- cd <corpus>/react && lean-ctx find <pattern>
- cd <corpus>/react && lean-ctx read <relpath>
- cd <corpus>/react && lean-ctx read <relpath> -m signatures
- cd <corpus>/react && lean-ctx ls <relpath>
Forbidden: Read, grep, rg, find, cat, ls, head, tail, sed, codedb, sqlite3, any mcp__*.

name: codegraph (MCP, knowledge-graph index)
constraint_prompt:
Use ONLY these MCP tools:
- mcp__codegraph__codegraph_search   (symbol lookup by name)
- mcp__codegraph__codegraph_context  (PRIMARY — comprehensive context for a topic)
- mcp__codegraph__codegraph_callers  (who calls a symbol)
- mcp__codegraph__codegraph_callees  (what a symbol calls)
- mcp__codegraph__codegraph_impact   (blast radius of changing a symbol)
- mcp__codegraph__codegraph_node     (full source/signature for a symbol)
- mcp__codegraph__codegraph_explore  (deep dive for unfamiliar topics)
- mcp__codegraph__codegraph_files    (file/dir tree)
- mcp__codegraph__codegraph_status   (index stats)
Forbidden: Read, grep, rg, find, cat, ls, head, tail, sed, codedb, sqlite3, lean-ctx, any other mcp__*.
The codegraph MCP server auto-detects the project from cwd (looks for .codegraph/).
